tasks.title: Implement Google Drive Time-Series State Database with Google Sheets API
tasks.description: Create append-only time-series database using Google Sheets API to track financial metrics evolution for delta intelligence calculations with automatic company-specific sheet creation and metric history tracking.
tasks.details: Implement enterprise-grade time-series state management using Google Sheets API v4 with 2025 best practices: 1) Create StateDatabase service using googleapis Node.js client v118+ with OAuth2 service account authentication and proper scopes (spreadsheets, drive.file). 2) Design schema with company-specific spreadsheets containing separate sheets for revenue_history, valuation_history, kpi_snapshots, and document_lineage with standardized column structures (timestamp, document_source, metric_value, unit, confidence, extracted_by, context). 3) Implement append-only operations using batchUpdate API for atomic multi-row insertions with proper error handling and retry logic using exponential backoff (max 3 retries, 2^n second delays). 4) Build MetricExtractor service with regex patterns for financial metrics (revenue: /revenue[:\s]*\$?([0-9,]+(?:\.[0-9]+)?)\s*([kmb]illion?|[kmb]|million?)?/i, valuation, ARR, burn_rate) with confidence scoring based on pattern match quality. 5) Create automatic spreadsheet provisioning for new companies with template-based sheet creation and proper sharing permissions. 6) Implement data validation with duplicate detection using content hashes and data integrity checks. 7) Add batch processing capabilities for handling multiple metric updates per document with transaction-like behavior using Google Sheets batch operations. 8) Include comprehensive error handling for API quotas (100 requests/100 seconds/user), network failures, and authentication token refresh with circuit breaker pattern. 9) Add monitoring and logging using structured logging (Winston or Pino) with performance metrics and API usage tracking.
tasks.testStrategy: Test Google Sheets API authentication with service account and proper scope validation, validate company-specific spreadsheet creation with template structure, test metric extraction accuracy with sample financial documents achieving >95% success rate on known patterns, verify append-only operations with concurrent access scenarios and race condition handling, test batch processing performance with 100+ metric updates, validate error handling with API quota exhaustion and network failures, test data integrity with duplicate detection and validation logic, benchmark API performance under load with proper rate limiting, verify monitoring and alerting functionality with comprehensive metrics collection.

subtasks.title: Setup Google Sheets API Authentication and Project Configuration
subtasks.description: Configure Google Cloud project with Sheets API v4 and Drive API access, set up OAuth2 service account authentication with proper scopes, and implement googleapis Node.js client v118+ with authentication handling and token refresh mechanisms.
subtasks.details: Create Google Cloud Console project with Google Sheets API v4 and Google Drive API enabled. Generate service account credentials with JSON key file and configure domain-wide delegation if needed. Install googleapis npm package v118+ and implement authentication service with proper scopes (https://www.googleapis.com/auth/spreadsheets, https://www.googleapis.com/auth/drive.file). Include error handling for authentication failures, token refresh logic, and credential validation. Set up environment variables for secure credential storage and implement connection testing functionality.
subtasks.testStrategy: Test service account authentication with valid and invalid credentials, verify API scope access with actual Google Sheets operations, validate token refresh mechanism with expired tokens, and ensure proper error handling for authentication failures. Test connection to both Sheets API v4 and Drive API with service account credentials.

subtasks.title: Design and Implement Time-Series Database Schema
subtasks.description: Create standardized schema for company-specific Google Sheets with separate sheets for revenue_history, valuation_history, kpi_snapshots, and document_lineage, implementing consistent column structures and data validation rules.
subtasks.details: Define schema structure with standardized columns: timestamp (ISO 8601), document_source (file path/URL), metric_value (numerical), unit (currency/percentage/count), confidence (0-1 score), extracted_by (system/manual), context (extraction metadata). Create template sheets for each metric type: revenue_history, valuation_history, kpi_snapshots, document_lineage. Implement data validation rules using Google Sheets data validation API including number formatting, required fields, and data types. Add column headers, formatting, and initial setup for each sheet type. Include metadata sheets for tracking schema version and company information.
subtasks.testStrategy: Validate schema creation with multiple company spreadsheets, test column structure consistency across different metric types, verify data validation rules prevent invalid data entry, and ensure proper formatting and data types. Test sheet creation with complete schema including all required columns and validation rules.

subtasks.title: Build Metric Extraction Engine with Financial Pattern Recognition
subtasks.description: Implement MetricExtractor service with regex patterns for financial metrics including revenue, valuation, ARR, and burn_rate with confidence scoring based on pattern match quality and context analysis.
subtasks.details: Create MetricExtractor class with comprehensive regex patterns: revenue (/revenue[:\s]*\$?([0-9,]+(?:\.[0-9]+)?)\s*([kmb]illion?|[kmb]|million?)?/i), valuation patterns, ARR extraction, burn_rate detection. Implement confidence scoring algorithm based on pattern match strength, context keywords, document source type, and data consistency. Add unit parsing and normalization (convert 'k', 'M', 'B' suffixes to actual numbers). Include context analysis to improve extraction accuracy using surrounding text. Add support for multiple document formats and text extraction preprocessing. Implement validation and sanitization of extracted values.
subtasks.testStrategy: Test regex patterns with sample financial documents containing various metric formats, validate confidence scoring accuracy with known good/bad extractions achieving target >85% precision, test unit conversion and normalization with different formats ($1M, 1 million, 1000000), and verify context analysis improves extraction quality. Test with edge cases including malformed numbers and ambiguous contexts.

subtasks.title: Implement StateDatabase Service with Append-Only Operations
subtasks.description: Create StateDatabase service class that manages Google Sheets operations including company spreadsheet creation, append-only metric storage using batchUpdate API, and atomic multi-row insertions with proper error handling and retry logic.
subtasks.details: Build StateDatabase service class with methods for creating company-specific spreadsheets, appending metric data using Google Sheets batchUpdate API for atomic operations. Implement retry logic with exponential backoff (max 3 retries, 2^n second delays) for handling API rate limits and transient failures. Add batch processing capabilities for multiple metrics per operation with transaction-like behavior. Include methods for querying historical data, checking for duplicates using content hashes, and maintaining data integrity. Implement proper error handling for quota limits (100 requests/100 seconds/user), authentication errors, and network failures. Add circuit breaker pattern for API resilience.
subtasks.testStrategy: Test append-only operations with single and batch metric insertions, validate atomic behavior with batchUpdate API ensuring data consistency, verify retry logic with simulated API failures and rate limiting, test duplicate detection using content hashes, and validate error handling for various failure scenarios including quota exhaustion and network timeouts.

subtasks.title: Create Automatic Company Spreadsheet Provisioning System
subtasks.description: Build automated system for creating new company-specific spreadsheets with template-based sheet initialization, proper sharing permissions, and folder organization in Google Drive.
subtasks.details: Implement CompanySpreadsheetProvisioner class that automatically creates new Google Sheets when new companies are detected. Use template-based creation with predefined schemas for each metric sheet type. Set up proper sharing permissions with service account access and configurable user permissions. Organize spreadsheets in Google Drive folders by company name or ID. Include metadata tracking for created spreadsheets including creation timestamp, template version, and access permissions. Add validation to prevent duplicate spreadsheet creation and handle naming conflicts. Implement spreadsheet discovery and mapping functionality to link companies to their respective sheets.
subtasks.testStrategy: Test automatic spreadsheet creation for new companies with complete sheet templates, verify proper sharing permissions allow service account access and restrict unauthorized access, validate folder organization and naming conventions, test duplicate prevention with existing companies, and ensure metadata tracking accurately records spreadsheet information and relationships.

subtasks.title: Implement Comprehensive Monitoring, Logging, and Error Management
subtasks.description: Add structured logging using Winston or Pino, implement performance metrics tracking, API usage monitoring, comprehensive error handling with circuit breaker pattern, and alerting system for critical failures.
subtasks.details: Set up structured logging framework using Winston or Pino with log levels, formatting, and rotation. Implement performance metrics tracking including API response times, batch processing durations, error rates, and throughput metrics. Add API usage monitoring for Google Sheets quotas and rate limiting with dashboard visualization. Create comprehensive error handling with categorized error types, proper error propagation, and recovery strategies. Implement circuit breaker pattern for external API calls with configurable thresholds and automatic recovery. Add alerting system for critical failures including authentication failures, quota exhaustion, data corruption, and service availability issues. Include health check endpoints and monitoring integration.
subtasks.testStrategy: Test structured logging with various log levels and formats, validate performance metrics collection accuracy and visualization, verify API usage monitoring correctly tracks quotas and rate limits, test error handling and categorization with simulated failures, validate circuit breaker pattern triggers and recovery under load, and ensure alerting system properly notifies for critical failures with appropriate escalation.

tasks.title: Build Real-Time Delta Calculation Engine with Historical Context Integration (Phase 2+ Full Implementation)
tasks.description: FUTURE IMPLEMENTATION: Implement real-time delta calculation system that compares new metrics against historical data to generate instant intelligence about metric changes, trends, and significance with smart alerting for PE teams. This represents the enhanced version using existing JavaScript services from src/services/ and will be implemented after MVP validation.
tasks.details: PHASE 2+ FULL JAVASCRIPT IMPLEMENTATION: Build enterprise delta intelligence engine using Node.js/TypeScript with real-time processing capabilities leveraging existing src/services/ infrastructure: 1) Create DeltaCalculationService that queries historical metrics from Google Sheets state database and calculates real-time deltas (absolute change, percentage change, time-period analysis) with statistical significance testing using t-tests for trend validation. 2) Implement HistoricalContextService that retrieves 6+ months of metric history and generates trend analysis (linear regression, seasonal patterns, volatility calculations) using mathjs or ml-matrix libraries for statistical computations. 3) Build AlertingEngine with configurable thresholds (default: >10% change or >$1M absolute change) and priority classification (high: >25% or >$5M, medium: 10-25% or $1-5M, low: 5-10% or $500K-1M) with exponential backoff for repeated alerts. 4) Create SignificanceAssessment module that evaluates metric changes against historical volatility and company context using z-score analysis and confidence intervals (95% confidence threshold). 5) Implement TrendDetectionAlgorithms including moving averages (SMA, EMA), momentum indicators, and pattern recognition for identifying acceleration/deceleration in growth rates. 6) Add CompanyBenchmarking service that compares metrics across portfolio companies for relative performance analysis with industry-adjusted scoring. 7) Build NotificationOrchestrator that routes alerts to appropriate stakeholders based on significance levels and company ownership structures with rate limiting (max 5 alerts/hour/company). 8) Implement caching layer using Redis for frequent metric lookups with 1-hour TTL and cache warming strategies for active companies. 9) Add comprehensive monitoring with processing time metrics (<30 seconds target), accuracy tracking, and alert effectiveness measurement.
tasks.testStrategy: Test delta calculation accuracy with known historical data scenarios and validate statistical significance testing, verify historical context retrieval with 6+ months of sample data and trend analysis accuracy, test alerting engine with various threshold configurations and priority classifications, validate significance assessment with statistical confidence intervals and z-score calculations, test trend detection algorithms with synthetic time-series data covering various patterns (growth, decline, volatility), verify company benchmarking accuracy with multi-company datasets, test notification orchestration with rate limiting and stakeholder routing logic, validate caching performance with high-frequency metric updates, benchmark processing speed achieving <30-second target for delta calculations, test error handling with missing historical data and API failures.

tasks.title: Enhance AI Agent Pipeline with Delta Intelligence and Historical Context (Phase 2+ Full Implementation)
tasks.description: FUTURE IMPLEMENTATION: Upgrade existing 5 AI agents (Executive Summary, Financial Analysis, Market Analysis, Investment Thesis, Recommendation) plus new State Analysis Agent to process delta intelligence and historical context for more informed investment analysis. This represents the enhanced version using existing JavaScript services from src/services/ and will be implemented after MVP validation.
tasks.details: PHASE 2+ FULL JAVASCRIPT IMPLEMENTATION: Enhance AI agent pipeline with delta intelligence capabilities using latest LLM models and existing src/services/ infrastructure: 1) Upgrade existing AI agents to GPT-4o-2024-11-20 or Claude-3.5-Sonnet-20241022 for optimal 2025 performance with proper API key rotation and fallback mechanisms. 2) Create new StateAnalysisAgent specialized in delta intelligence with prompts optimized for metric change analysis: 'Analyze {companyName} metric changes: {deltaData}. Historical context: {historicalTrends}. What caused changes? Significance? Investigate priorities? Valuation impact?' with structured output parsing. 3) Modify existing agents to consume delta intelligence: ExecutiveSummaryAgent integrates metric changes into company overview, FinancialAnalysisAgent incorporates trend analysis, MarketAnalysisAgent correlates market changes with performance deltas, InvestmentThesisAgent updates thesis based on metric evolution, RecommendationAgent adjusts recommendations with delta-driven insights. 4) Implement ContextualPromptEngineering that dynamically injects relevant historical data, delta intelligence, and company-specific context into agent prompts with token optimization for maximum context utilization. 5) Build ProgressiveAnalysisFramework where each agent builds upon previous agent outputs while incorporating new delta intelligence, creating compound insights through agent coordination. 6) Add AgentOutputValidation with structured response parsing, confidence scoring, and quality assessment to ensure consistent output formats and actionable insights. 7) Implement AgentCoordinationService that manages execution order, passes context between agents, and handles partial failures with graceful degradation. 8) Create ResponseSynthesizer that combines all agent outputs with delta intelligence into coherent analysis reports with proper citation of metric changes and historical trends. 9) Add comprehensive monitoring with agent response times, success rates, and output quality metrics with alerting for degraded performance.
tasks.testStrategy: Test enhanced agents with sample delta intelligence data and validate improved analysis quality compared to baseline, verify StateAnalysisAgent accuracy with various metric change scenarios and historical context integration, validate agent coordination with sequential processing and context passing between agents, test progressive analysis framework with incremental document additions showing compound insight improvement, verify contextual prompt engineering with optimal token utilization and relevant context injection, test agent output validation with structured response parsing and confidence scoring accuracy, validate response synthesis quality combining multiple agent outputs with delta intelligence, benchmark agent response times with target <2 minutes per agent, test error handling with agent failures and graceful degradation scenarios, verify monitoring system with comprehensive metrics collection and performance alerting.

tasks.title: Implement Advanced Document Processing with Metric Extraction Engine (Phase 2+ Full Implementation)
tasks.description: FUTURE IMPLEMENTATION: Build comprehensive document processing pipeline that extracts structured data and financial metrics from PDF, Excel, Word, and PowerPoint documents with intelligent parsing and confidence scoring. This represents the enhanced version using existing JavaScript services from src/services/ and will be implemented after MVP validation.
tasks.details: PHASE 2+ FULL JAVASCRIPT IMPLEMENTATION: Implement advanced document processing microservices using Python 3.11+ with FastAPI framework, building upon existing src/services/ infrastructure: 1) Create DocumentTypeDetector using python-magic and file signature analysis with MIME type validation and confidence scoring (>95% accuracy target). 2) Build PDFProcessor using PyMuPDF (fitz) for superior text extraction, camelot-py for table extraction, and easyocr for OCR on scanned documents with layout analysis using pdfplumber for structured content parsing. 3) Implement ExcelProcessor using openpyxl for .xlsx files and xlrd for .xls compatibility, with automatic sheet detection, formula evaluation, and data type inference for financial metrics. 4) Create WordProcessor using python-docx with table extraction, header/paragraph parsing, and metadata extraction including tracked changes and comments. 5) Build PowerPointProcessor using python-pptx for slide content extraction, notes parsing, and embedded chart data extraction with image metadata analysis. 6) Develop MetricExtractionEngine with advanced regex patterns for financial metrics: revenue (/(?:total\s+)?(?:net\s+)?revenue[:\s]*[$]?([0-9,.]+)(?:\s*([kmbt])?(?:illion)?)?/gi), profit margins (/(?:gross|net|operating)\s+margin[:\s]*([0-9.]+)%/gi), growth rates (/(?:revenue|sales)\s+growth[:\s]*([0-9.-]+)%/gi) with context-aware validation and unit normalization. 7) Implement ConfidenceScoring based on pattern match quality, document structure, and extraction consistency with machine learning model for accuracy prediction. 8) Add DocumentSanitization with virus scanning using ClamAV, content validation, and suspicious content detection. 9) Create AsyncProcessingQueue using Celery with Redis backend for handling large documents and batch processing with progress tracking and result caching (24-hour TTL).
tasks.testStrategy: Test document type detection with comprehensive file format samples including corrupted files, validate PDF processing with complex layouts, tables, and scanned documents achieving >90% text extraction accuracy, test Excel processing with multi-sheet workbooks, formulas, and various data types, verify Word processing with tables, embedded objects, and complex formatting, test PowerPoint extraction with various slide layouts and embedded content, validate metric extraction with financial documents achieving >95% accuracy on known patterns, test confidence scoring correlation with actual accuracy on validation dataset, verify document sanitization with malware samples and suspicious content detection, validate async processing performance with concurrent document uploads, benchmark processing speed targets: PDF <30s, Excel <15s, Word <10s, PowerPoint <20s per document.

tasks.title: Build Smart Notification System with Priority-Based Alerting (Phase 2+ Full Implementation)
tasks.description: FUTURE IMPLEMENTATION: Create intelligent notification system that sends priority-based alerts for significant metric changes, document updates, and analysis completion with configurable stakeholder routing and delivery confirmation. This represents the enhanced version using existing JavaScript services from src/services/ and will be implemented after MVP validation.
tasks.details: PHASE 2+ FULL JAVASCRIPT IMPLEMENTATION: Implement enterprise notification system with intelligent routing and delivery confirmation using existing src/services/ infrastructure: 1) Create NotificationClassificationEngine that categorizes alerts by urgency: CRITICAL (>25% metric change or >$5M), URGENT (10-25% or $1-5M), HIGH (5-10% or $500K-1M), NORMAL (document updates), LOW (routine processing) with custom thresholds per company/metric. 2) Build StakeholderRoutingService with role-based delivery: Partners receive CRITICAL/URGENT, Analysts receive HIGH+, Team receives all levels, with escalation paths for unacknowledged critical alerts (15-minute escalation window). 3) Implement MultiChannelDelivery supporting email (SendGrid API), Slack (Webhook API), SMS (Twilio API), and push notifications with delivery preference management per stakeholder. 4) Create NotificationTemplateEngine using Handlebars.js with dynamic content: metric change summaries, historical context, document impact analysis, and actionable next steps with personalized greetings and company-specific branding. 5) Build DeliveryConfirmationTracker with read receipts, click tracking, and response monitoring using webhook callbacks and tracking pixels with 48-hour follow-up for unacknowledged critical alerts. 6) Add RateLimiting service preventing notification spam: max 5 critical alerts/hour/company, 10 urgent/hour, 20 high/hour with intelligent batching for multiple simultaneous changes. 7) Implement NotificationScheduler with timezone-aware delivery (business hours only for non-critical), quiet hours configuration (no notifications 10pm-7am), and weekend/holiday handling with emergency override capabilities. 8) Create NotificationAnalytics tracking delivery rates, open rates, response times, and effectiveness metrics with dashboard reporting for optimization insights. 9) Add comprehensive error handling with retry logic, fallback delivery methods, and dead letter queues for failed notifications.
tasks.testStrategy: Test notification classification with various metric change scenarios and validate appropriate urgency assignment, verify stakeholder routing with different role configurations and escalation paths, test multi-channel delivery across email, Slack, SMS with delivery confirmation accuracy, validate notification templates with dynamic content rendering and personalization, test delivery confirmation tracking with read receipts and response monitoring, verify rate limiting effectiveness preventing spam while ensuring critical alerts are delivered, test timezone-aware scheduling with business hours and quiet hours configurations, validate analytics tracking with accurate metrics collection and reporting, test error handling with failed deliveries and retry logic, benchmark notification delivery speed with target <2 minutes for critical alerts.

tasks.title: Create Living Analysis Report System with Version Control (Phase 2+ Full Implementation)
tasks.description: FUTURE IMPLEMENTATION: Build dynamic report generation system that creates version-controlled analysis reports showing document impact, metric evolution, and progressive analysis enhancement with visual delta intelligence dashboards. This represents the enhanced version using existing JavaScript services from src/services/ and will be implemented after MVP validation.
tasks.details: PHASE 2+ FULL JAVASCRIPT IMPLEMENTATION: Implement comprehensive report generation system with version control and change tracking using existing src/services/ infrastructure: 1) Create ReportVersioningService using PostgreSQL with semantic versioning (major.minor.patch) for tracking significant analysis changes, document additions, and metric updates with complete audit trail and diff capabilities. 2) Build DynamicReportGenerator using React.js/Next.js with server-side rendering that combines AI agent outputs, delta intelligence, and historical context into comprehensive investment analysis reports with interactive visualizations. 3) Implement ChangeVisualizationEngine using Chart.js/D3.js for creating metric evolution charts, trend analysis graphs, confidence interval plots, and document impact timelines with drill-down capabilities and hover tooltips. 4) Create ReportTemplateSystem with customizable layouts: Executive Summary template, Detailed Analysis template, Delta Focus template, and Custom templates with drag-drop section arrangement and company branding. 5) Build DocumentImpactAnalysis that shows how each new document influenced the analysis with before/after comparisons, confidence score changes, and narrative evolution tracking using text similarity algorithms. 6) Implement ReportDistributionPipeline with automated PDF generation using Puppeteer, email distribution with attachment management, and web-based report sharing with access control and expiration dates. 7) Add CollaborationFeatures including comment systems, approval workflows, and stakeholder feedback collection with version-specific discussions and resolution tracking. 8) Create ReportAnalytics measuring report engagement (time spent, sections viewed, downloads), stakeholder feedback scores, and decision impact tracking with effectiveness metrics. 9) Implement CachingStrategy using Redis for frequently accessed reports with smart cache invalidation when new data becomes available and pre-generation of high-priority reports.
tasks.testStrategy: Test report versioning with multiple document additions and validate proper version increment logic, verify dynamic report generation with comprehensive analysis content and proper formatting, test change visualization accuracy with metric evolution charts and trend analysis, validate report templates with customizable layouts and company branding, test document impact analysis showing before/after comparisons and confidence changes, verify distribution pipeline with PDF generation quality and email delivery, test collaboration features with comment systems and approval workflows, validate report analytics with engagement tracking and effectiveness measurement, test caching performance with smart invalidation and pre-generation strategies, benchmark report generation speed with target <60 seconds for comprehensive reports.

tasks.title: Implement Company Portfolio Comparison and Benchmarking System (Phase 2+ Full Implementation)
tasks.description: FUTURE IMPLEMENTATION: Build cross-company analysis system that enables portfolio-wide metric comparison, relative performance benchmarking, and industry-adjusted scoring for strategic portfolio insights. This represents the enhanced version using existing JavaScript services from src/services/ and will be implemented after MVP validation.
tasks.details: PHASE 2+ FULL JAVASCRIPT IMPLEMENTATION: Create portfolio-wide comparison and benchmarking system using existing src/services/ infrastructure: 1) Build PortfolioAnalyticsEngine that aggregates metrics across all companies in the time-series state database with data normalization for different company sizes, industries, and reporting periods using statistical standardization techniques. 2) Implement CompanyBenchmarking service using quartile analysis, percentile rankings, and peer group identification based on industry, revenue size, and growth stage with automatic peer group updates. 3) Create IndustryAdjustment algorithms that normalize metrics against industry benchmarks using external data sources (Crunchbase API, SEC filings, industry reports) with periodic recalibration and confidence intervals. 4) Build RelativePerformanceScoring with weighted metrics calculation: revenue growth (30%), profitability (25%), market position (20%), efficiency metrics (15%), risk factors (10%) with customizable weighting per portfolio strategy. 5) Implement TrendAnalysisComparison that identifies portfolio-wide patterns, outlier companies, and correlation analysis between company performances with statistical significance testing. 6) Create PortfolioDashboard using React.js with interactive charts showing portfolio distribution, performance heat maps, trend correlation matrices, and drill-down capabilities with real-time updates. 7) Add AlertingSystem for portfolio-level events: new top performer identification, concerning performance divergence, and portfolio risk concentration with automatic stakeholder notifications. 8) Implement ExportCapabilities for portfolio reports in multiple formats (PDF, Excel, PowerPoint) with customizable templates and scheduled distribution to limited partners and stakeholders. 9) Create APIEndpoints for third-party integrations with existing PE firm systems, CRM platforms, and reporting tools with proper authentication and rate limiting.
tasks.testStrategy: Test portfolio analytics with multi-company datasets and validate data normalization accuracy, verify company benchmarking with quartile analysis and peer group identification, test industry adjustment algorithms with external data integration and confidence intervals, validate relative performance scoring with weighted metrics and customizable weighting, test trend analysis comparison with statistical significance and correlation analysis, verify portfolio dashboard functionality with interactive visualizations and real-time updates, test alerting system with portfolio-level event detection and stakeholder notifications, validate export capabilities with multiple formats and scheduled distribution, test API endpoints with authentication, rate limiting, and third-party integration compatibility.

tasks.title: Build Advanced Security and Audit System for Financial Data (Phase 2+ Full Implementation)
tasks.description: FUTURE IMPLEMENTATION: Implement comprehensive security framework with encryption, audit logging, access control, and compliance features for handling sensitive PE financial documents and analysis data. This represents the enhanced version using existing JavaScript services from src/services/ and will be implemented after MVP validation.
tasks.details: PHASE 2+ FULL JAVASCRIPT IMPLEMENTATION: Implement enterprise-grade security and compliance framework using existing src/services/ infrastructure: 1) Create DataEncryption service using AES-256-GCM for at-rest encryption of sensitive financial data in PostgreSQL with field-level encryption for PII/financial metrics and key rotation using AWS KMS or Google Cloud KMS with automatic 90-day rotation. 2) Build AccessControlSystem with role-based permissions (Admin, Partner, Analyst, Viewer) and attribute-based access control (ABAC) for company-specific data isolation with multi-factor authentication using TOTP/FIDO2. 3) Implement ComprehensiveAuditLogging capturing all data access, modifications, and system events with immutable log storage using blockchain-based verification or AWS CloudTrail with 7-year retention policy. 4) Create DataLineageTracking that maintains complete chain of custody for financial metrics from document source through analysis to report generation with cryptographic signatures and timestamps. 5) Build ComplianceFramework supporting SOC2 Type II, ISO 27001, and GDPR requirements with automated compliance checks, policy enforcement, and reporting dashboards with quarterly compliance attestation. 6) Implement DataResidency controls ensuring data remains in specified jurisdictions with geographic restrictions and cross-border transfer monitoring using geolocation validation. 7) Add ThreatDetection with anomaly detection for unusual access patterns, failed authentication monitoring, and behavioral analysis using machine learning models with real-time alerting. 8) Create DataRetentionPolicies with automated archival, secure deletion capabilities, and right-to-be-forgotten implementation with cryptographic proof of deletion. 9) Build SecurityDashboard with real-time threat monitoring, compliance status tracking, audit report generation, and incident response workflows with integration to SIEM systems.
tasks.testStrategy: Test data encryption with field-level encryption validation and key rotation verification, validate access control system with role-based permissions and multi-factor authentication, test audit logging completeness with immutable storage and event tracking, verify data lineage tracking with cryptographic signatures and chain of custody, validate compliance framework with SOC2/ISO27001 controls and automated checks, test data residency controls with geographic restrictions and transfer monitoring, verify threat detection with anomaly identification and behavioral analysis, test data retention policies with secure deletion and proof of deletion, validate security dashboard with real-time monitoring and incident response workflows.

tasks.title: Implement System Performance Monitoring and Optimization Framework (Phase 2+ Full Implementation)
tasks.description: FUTURE IMPLEMENTATION: Build comprehensive monitoring system with performance metrics, health checks, alert management, and automated optimization for production-scale deployment with SLA compliance tracking. This represents the enhanced version using existing JavaScript services from src/services/ and will be implemented after MVP validation.
tasks.details: PHASE 2+ FULL JAVASCRIPT IMPLEMENTATION: Create enterprise monitoring and optimization framework using existing src/services/ infrastructure: 1) Build ApplicationPerformanceMonitoring (APM) using Prometheus metrics collection, Grafana dashboards, and New Relic/DataDog integration with custom metrics for document processing times, AI agent response times, database query performance, and API endpoint latency with 95th percentile tracking. 2) Implement HealthCheckFramework with deep health checks for all system components: database connectivity, external API availability, Redis cache performance, Google Drive API quotas, AI model endpoints with automated failover and circuit breaker patterns. 3) Create AlertManagement system using AlertManager with intelligent alert routing, escalation policies, and on-call scheduling with PagerDuty integration and alert fatigue prevention through intelligent grouping and suppression. 4) Build PerformanceOptimization engine with automated query optimization, cache warming strategies, connection pool tuning, and resource scaling recommendations based on usage patterns and performance metrics. 5) Implement SLAMonitoring with service level objectives: document processing <5 minutes (95%), AI analysis <10 minutes (95%), system uptime >99.9%, API response time <2 seconds (95%) with automated SLA reporting and breach notifications. 6) Create ResourceUsageTracking for CPU, memory, disk I/O, network bandwidth, and API quota consumption with predictive scaling recommendations and cost optimization insights. 7) Add ErrorTracking and debugging tools with distributed tracing using Jaeger/Zipkin, error aggregation using Sentry, and log analysis with structured logging and correlation IDs. 8) Build CapacityPlanningDashboard with usage trend analysis, growth projections, and infrastructure scaling recommendations with cost impact analysis and approval workflows. 9) Implement AutomatedOptimization with self-healing capabilities, performance tuning recommendations, and proactive maintenance scheduling based on system metrics and usage patterns.
tasks.testStrategy: Test APM with comprehensive metrics collection and dashboard visualization accuracy, validate health check framework with component failure scenarios and automated failover, test alert management with intelligent routing and escalation policies, verify performance optimization with automated query tuning and scaling recommendations, validate SLA monitoring with service level tracking and breach notifications, test resource usage tracking with predictive scaling and cost optimization, verify error tracking with distributed tracing and error aggregation, test capacity planning with growth projections and scaling recommendations, validate automated optimization with self-healing capabilities and maintenance scheduling.

tasks.title: Create Production Deployment and DevOps Pipeline (Phase 2+ Full Implementation)
tasks.description: FUTURE IMPLEMENTATION: Build complete DevOps infrastructure with CI/CD pipelines, containerization, infrastructure as code, and blue-green deployment for zero-downtime production deployment with comprehensive testing and monitoring. This represents the enhanced version using existing JavaScript services from src/services/ and will be implemented after MVP validation.
tasks.details: PHASE 2+ FULL JAVASCRIPT IMPLEMENTATION: Implement comprehensive DevOps and deployment infrastructure for existing src/services/ infrastructure: 1) Create ContainerizationStrategy using Docker with multi-stage builds for Node.js/Python services, Alpine Linux base images for security, and proper layer caching for build optimization with image size <500MB per service. 2) Build KubernetesDeployment using Helm charts with HorizontalPodAutoscaler for automatic scaling, resource limits/requests optimization, health checks, and rolling updates with proper service mesh integration using Istio. 3) Implement InfrastructureAsCode using Terraform for cloud resource provisioning (AWS/GCP/Azure) with module-based architecture, state management, and environment-specific configurations with automated drift detection. 4) Create CI/CDPipeline using GitHub Actions or GitLab CI with automated testing (unit, integration, security), code quality checks (ESLint, SonarQube), dependency vulnerability scanning, and automated deployment with approval gates. 5) Build BlueGreenDeployment strategy with traffic shifting, automated rollback triggers, and zero-downtime deployment validation with canary releases for critical updates and A/B testing capabilities. 6) Implement SecretsManagement using HashiCorp Vault or cloud-native solutions (AWS Secrets Manager, Google Secret Manager) with automatic secret rotation, encryption at rest/in-transit, and audit logging. 7) Add DatabaseMigration automation with schema versioning, rollback capabilities, and data migration validation with zero-downtime migration strategies for production environments. 8) Create MonitoringIntegration with deployment tracking, performance impact analysis, and automated rollback triggers based on error rates, latency increases, or custom SLI violations. 9) Build DisasterRecovery procedures with automated backups, cross-region replication, RTO/RPO targets (RTO: <30 minutes, RPO: <5 minutes), and regular disaster recovery testing with documentation and runbooks.
tasks.testStrategy: Test containerization with multi-stage builds and security scanning, validate Kubernetes deployment with autoscaling and rolling updates, test infrastructure as code with multi-environment provisioning and drift detection, verify CI/CD pipeline with automated testing and quality gates, test blue-green deployment with traffic shifting and automated rollback, validate secrets management with rotation and encryption, test database migration with zero-downtime strategies, verify monitoring integration with deployment tracking and automated rollback, test disaster recovery procedures with RTO/RPO targets and recovery validation.

tasks.title: n8n Workflow Setup and API Configuration
tasks.description: Create the foundational 5-node n8n workflow with all required API integrations and authentication setup
tasks.details: Set up n8n Cloud subscription and create new workflow. Configure Google Drive API connections with proper authentication for monitoring company folders (/Private Companies/CompanyA/). Set up Google Sheets API authentication for state database operations. Configure OpenAI API integration with GPT-4 access. Create the basic 5-node structure: Google Drive Trigger → Extract From File → Code Node → OpenAI Node → Google Sheets Node. Test all API connections and ensure proper authentication flows. Set up environment variables and secure credential storage within n8n.
tasks.testStrategy: Verify each API connection individually by testing authentication and basic operations. Test Google Drive trigger with sample file uploads. Validate Google Sheets read/write permissions. Confirm OpenAI API access with test prompt. Ensure all credentials are properly secured and accessible within workflow.

tasks.title: Document Processing and Text Extraction Implementation
tasks.description: Implement Node 1 (Google Drive Trigger) and Node 2 (Extract From File) for monitoring and processing PE documents
tasks.details: Configure Google Drive Trigger node to watch for file changes (added/modified) in specific company folders. Set up file type filtering for PDF, Excel (.xlsx), Word (.docx), and PowerPoint (.pptx) formats. Implement Extract From File node with proper configuration for each document type, preserving formatting metadata and extraction confidence scores. Add error handling for unsupported formats and corrupted files. Implement document metadata extraction including company identification, document type, and file properties. Add logging for processing status and extraction confidence levels.
tasks.testStrategy: Test with sample documents of each supported format (PDF, Excel, Word, PowerPoint). Verify trigger activation on file uploads and modifications. Validate text extraction quality and formatting preservation. Test error handling with corrupted or unsupported files. Measure extraction confidence scores and processing time for different document sizes.

tasks.title: Metric Extraction Code Node Development
tasks.description: Translate existing MetricExtractor.js regex patterns into n8n Code Node for financial metric extraction
tasks.details: Implement JavaScript Code Node containing translated regex patterns from Phase 1 MetricExtractor.js (89.6% accuracy benchmark). Create pattern matching logic for key metrics: revenue, valuation, ARR, growth rates, customer counts, burn rate. Implement confidence scoring algorithm and context extraction around matched metrics. Add data validation and normalization for extracted numerical values. Include error handling for edge cases and malformed data. Implement fallback logic for partial matches and ambiguous contexts. Structure output as JSON with metric type, value, confidence score, and context snippet.
tasks.testStrategy: Test regex patterns against known sample documents with verified metrics. Compare extraction accuracy against Phase 1 benchmarks (target >85%). Validate confidence scoring accuracy and context extraction quality. Test edge cases including currency conversions, percentage formats, and abbreviated numbers. Measure processing performance and memory usage for large documents.

tasks.title: LLM Validation and Enhancement Integration
tasks.description: Implement Node 4 (OpenAI Node) for validating and enhancing regex extraction results using GPT-4
tasks.details: Configure OpenAI Node with GPT-4 model and optimized parameters for financial document analysis. Design prompt templates for metric validation that review regex-extracted results for accuracy and completeness. Implement response parsing to integrate LLM suggestions with existing regex results. Add confidence scoring enhancement and context validation logic. Implement cost optimization with token usage monitoring and request batching. Create fallback mechanisms when LLM API is unavailable. Add logic to identify missed financial data points and provide additional context. Structure enhanced output maintaining compatibility with downstream processing.
tasks.testStrategy: Test LLM validation against known ground truth metrics from sample documents. Measure accuracy improvement over regex-only extraction (target 10-15% improvement). Monitor API costs and token usage for different document types and sizes. Test fallback behavior when OpenAI API is unavailable. Validate response parsing and integration with regex results. Measure processing time impact of LLM validation step.

tasks.title: State Database Operations and Google Sheets Integration
tasks.description: Implement Node 5 (Google Sheets) for state database operations based on existing StateDatabase.js logic
tasks.details: Implement Google Sheets Node operations translating StateDatabase.js logic for data persistence. Apply DatabaseSchema.js schemas to Google Sheets structure with proper column mapping and data types. Implement append operations for new metrics and update operations for existing records. Add delta calculation logic comparing new metrics against historical data for real-time intelligence. Create automatic spreadsheet provisioning logic for new companies. Implement time-series data organization with proper indexing and querying capabilities. Add data validation and constraint checking before database operations. Include audit trail functionality for tracking document lineage and processing history.
tasks.testStrategy: Test database operations with sample metric data ensuring proper schema compliance. Validate delta calculations against historical data scenarios. Test automatic spreadsheet creation for new companies. Verify data integrity and constraint validation. Test concurrent access scenarios and data consistency. Measure database operation performance and error handling for network issues.

tasks.title: Error Handling, Monitoring, and End-to-End Testing
tasks.description: Implement comprehensive error handling, monitoring, and validate complete workflow with realistic PE document scenarios
tasks.details: Implement simplified circuit breaker pattern within n8n workflow for handling API failures and timeouts. Add comprehensive error handling at each node with proper error propagation and recovery mechanisms. Configure workflow execution monitoring with logging and alerting for failures. Set up retry logic with exponential backoff for transient failures. Implement performance metrics tracking including processing time, accuracy rates, and resource usage. Add failure notifications via email or webhook integrations. Create workflow health checks and status reporting. Implement end-to-end testing with realistic PE document scenarios covering all supported formats and metric types. Add load testing for concurrent document processing and scalability validation.
tasks.testStrategy: Test error scenarios including API failures, network timeouts, and malformed documents. Validate retry logic and circuit breaker functionality. Test monitoring and alerting systems with simulated failures. Conduct end-to-end testing with complete PE document processing workflows. Perform load testing with multiple concurrent documents. Validate accuracy targets (>85% metric extraction, >95% document processing success). Test cost efficiency targets (<$10 per 100 documents). Measure processing time targets (<5 minutes per document).
